channel.title: data-types on Abdus
channel.description: Recent content in data-types on Abdus

item.title: Data Types
item.description: Every value in Rust is of a certain data type, which tells Rust what kind of data is being specified so it knows how to work with that data. Data Types in Rust: Scalar Integers (i8 | u8) - 8-bit Integer (i16 | u16) - 16-bit Integer (i32 | u32) - 32-bit Integer (i64 | u64) - 64-bit Integer (i128 | u128) - 128-bit Integer (isize | usize) - Integer size depends upon the system architecture.
